summary: Twelve military armored vehicles assessed, all showing NO DAMAGE and confirmed operational, moving in formation across a dusty, arid terrain. The full scene depicts a dynamic, coordinated movement of a mechanized unit generating significant dust clouds as it traverses the landscape. The consistent NO DAMAGE assessments across all targets indicate the formation is fully functional and combat-ready.
